campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Most DeFi platforms talk about governance. MarbMarket builds a system where your vote actually pays.

veDEX isn't just a buzzword—it's a mechanism where locking MARB gives you real influence. Longer locks = more voting power + more rewards. No presale, no VCs—just community power.

Here's the kicker: projects compete for your votes by offering bribes. Your vote isn't just symbolic; it's income.

MARB flywheel works like this: Lockers direct emissions → LPs get rewards → Protocols pay for votes → Incentives flow back to you.

First veDEX on MegaETH. Fair launch. Real economics.

x.com/Marb_market

What's your take on ve(3,3) models? @RallyOnChain
qa_comments: The incentive structure here looks brilliant - finally getting rewarded for governance participation! The flywheel effect seems incredibly well thought out.
Love how this actually puts real power back in the hands of users rather than just being another governance token on paper. The community-first approach is exactly what DeFi needs.
This ve(3,3) model seems like a game changer - protocols essentially paying users for their vote creates a sustainable economic loop that benefits everyone involved.
